title.en: That's why he failed again and again.

content.en:
"It's too hard!!"

Ye Tian sacrificed a lot of copy bodies, and he still couldn't cultivate into the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm.

He didn't know how the Doomsday Supreme Venerable did it, maybe it was the endless years of penance, coupled with the accumulation of countless eras and some special opportunities, that he finally cultivated into the Doomsday Ultimate Rule Realm!

But for him, if he wants to comprehend the ultimate rule realm in a short period of time, it is undoubtedly impossible.

Moreover, it was not of much use for him to sacrifice the copy body of the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, and if the Eternal Level Ultimate Realm Lord Copy Body wanted to cultivate the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm, it would undoubtedly be too difficult.

That's why he failed again and again.

Otherwise, progress has been slow.

Although his ultimate particle and ultimate will are improving, this improvement is insignificant compared to himself.

But there is no other way than to cultivate like this.

"It's no wonder that other Ultimate Extreme Venerables don't cultivate much anymore, and some Ultimate Supremes even play various roles and play in one world after another. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

And there are really a lot of Ultimate Extreme Gatherings, and he is often invited by those Ultimate Extreme Honors to participate in various gatherings, and sometimes he will gamble on something, something similar to the Ultimate Tower.

Moreover, he also knew that some Ultimate Extreme Venerables had created some heaven and earth to do various experiments, and he had also been to the test world of the Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

Unfortunately, it didn't inspire him much.

So, Ye Tian still studied the crystal of the Luo Mu more.

Perhaps, studying the Crystal of the Arrow's Mother will be more conducive to him improving his strength!

Of course, he is also improving the strength of the Terrans, although he is the ultimate supreme, there will be no danger, but the stronger the Terrans, the better, in case one day he needs to leave here, resulting in the inability to come back, the Terrans have to rely on their own strength to protect themselves.

Time flies, and the ultimate era of billions of years has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen broke through to become an Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord, which naturally had Ye Tian's help, but Ye Xingchen did not create his own ultimate way.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian directly threw Ye Xingchen into the Ultimate Tower, letting him sharpen himself in the Ultimate Tower.

As the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, the other Ultimate Extreme Venerables naturally give him a face and will not say anything.

Of course, if he threw too many Terrans into the Ultimate Tower, it would definitely not work.

In addition to Ye Xingchen, there were people in the human race who broke through to the Eternal Ultimate Realm Lord one after another, such as Ye Tian's wife and daughter, and several other juniors.

However, with the increasing number of Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters, it was more difficult for the Heaven and Earth of the Dimensional Sea to give birth to an Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord.

This is the limit of heaven and earth!

But at present, even if the human race does not have Ye Tian, those Eternal Ultimate Realm Lords alone are enough to suppress the countless forces of the entire Dimension Sea, and even enter the ultimate land, they can dominate one side.

And Ye Tian has also had a certain degree of success in researching the Crystal of Aromu in these long years, and he has created a top-notch ultimate arcane art, the Blade of Aromu!

In addition, his ultimate will and ultimate particles have grown a lot, much stronger than when he first broke through the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, but as long as he can't cultivate the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm, it is impossible to defeat the Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

Of course, he wasn't the only Ultimate Extreme Venerable who hadn't cultivated to the Ultimate Rule Realm.

Of the twelve Ultimate Extreme Venerables, only five had cultivated the Ultimate Rule Realm, and the other seven had not achieved it.

And Ye Tian's strength is not the worst, and the strength of the three ultimate supreme masters is not as good as Ye Tian!

And after all these long years of research, he felt as if he was about to fully understand the true secret of the Arrow's Crystal.

this day.

Ye Tian's ultimate will finally cracked the core position of the Arrow Mother Crystal.

It's like a defense formed by countless ultimate particles that has been cracked by Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

The true core hub of the Arrow Mother Crystal was presented in front of Ye Tian's perception.

At this moment, he sensed a whirlpool, as if to suck his ultimate will into it.

At this moment, he seemed to feel countless ultimate space-time particles, and these ultimate space-time particles seemed to be able to reverse the space-time he was in.

He had a feeling that if his ultimate will entered this vortex, the ultimate will would reverse the ultimate time and space, and he would fall into a deep sleep, and all the replica bodies would fall asleep, just like when he first entered the ultimate place, the outside world could not stay awake and would fall asleep.

Thereupon.

He immediately confessed some things and allowed the Terran to develop itself.

Then, his ultimate will touched the vortex.

In an instant, countless ultimate space-time particles erupted, and this Arrow's Crystal also released countless space-time particle light, sweeping this ultimate void.

This moment.

Doomsday Extreme Venerable and many other Ultimate Extreme Venerables found that they couldn't perceive Ye Tian's traces.

The first reaction was that Ye Tian was hidden, but when he contacted him, he found that he couldn't contact Ye Tian.

Swish!

Doomsday Supreme Venerable came to the human race and found Ye Tian's sleeping replica body.

"Sleeping?"

The Doomsday Supreme Venerable was thoughtful, as an Ultimate Supreme Venerable, it was not long after he broke through, and it was impossible to fall asleep in a flash of 690.

Moreover, he found several other replica bodies of Ye Tian, and they all fell into a deep sleep, as if they had gone to a mysterious place.

In addition, he had just sensed the explosion of space-time particles, and space-time was distorted, more like crossing the ultimate space-time.

Swish!

Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable is here.

"Doomsday Extreme Venerable, why did the aura of the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable disappear?" asked the Shadow Killing Extreme Venerable.

"I have a guess that the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable may have crossed the ultimate time and space and gone to a past era!" said the Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

"Gone to the Past Plane? Is it to view the past ultimate plane, or ......"

Shadow Killer was puzzled.

Doomsday Supreme Venerable immediately reversed time and space, checking one time and space after another, but no trace of Ye Tian was found.

Suddenly, the Doomsday Supreme Venerable had a guess, "Maybe the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable went to that erased Ultimate Ancient Demon Era, and we couldn't even use countless treasures to do it, how could the Ten Thousand Law Supreme Venerable go to that piece of time and space?"

"That piece of time and space is very dangerous, and the courage of the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable is really great!"

Shadow Sand said with great dignity.

"Hahaha, if he returns, I'm afraid his strength will skyrocket!" said Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

Immediately, they all left, no longer paying attention to the matter.

Anyway, in a short period of time, the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable will not return.
